# Code of Conduct

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Keep technical disagreements focused on the code, design, and tradeoffs.
- Assume good intent, but be precise when pointing out risks or regressions.
- Avoid harassment, insults, threats, or discriminatory language.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Personal attacks or sustained hostile behavior.
- Publicly sharing private information.
- Spam, trolling, or repeated off-topic comments.
- Any behavior that makes collaboration unsafe or unproductive.

## Enforcement

Repository maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments; close issues; block users; or take other moderation actions when needed.

Report concerns privately to the repository owner.
